steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content: For infinitely many solutions, both sides must be identical for every $x$. First simplify the left side: $$(16x+36)/4-s/11=4x+9-s/11.$$ The right side is $$r(x-7)=rx-7r.$$

steps.title: Match coefficients
steps.content: The coefficient of $x$ on the left is $4$, so the coefficient of $x$ on the right must also be $4$. Thus, $r=4$.

steps.title: Match constants
steps.content: Substitute $r=4$ and match the constant terms: $$9-s/11=-7(4)=-28$$ $$-s/11=-37$$ $$s=407$$ The answer is 407.
